approval_event.approval_phrase: 批准进入 Round-02 approved-payload/routing 提案阶段
approval_event.approved_scope: GitHub-only approved payload and routing proposal for the 7 included non-runtime Round-02 candidates
still_excluded: live Agent environment install or sync

candidate_executions.rationale: Admit the open-format knowledge-file guidance as standalone portable payload because no approved Obsidian Skill exists in this repository and the useful behavior is file-format work, not live app control.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Created a source-text-neutral Skill for Obsidian-flavored Markdown, JSON Canvas, and Bases files; added the Kepano source lock, license notice, capability, route, relation, and deterministic scenario.
rejected_alternatives: Do not merge into local-only obsidian-vault because it is not approved release inventory.
Do not admit obsidian-cli or defuddle because they require runtime or tool-adapter approval.
Do not claim live Obsidian rendering without environment evidence.
boundary_assertions: no vault sync or mutation without explicit path-level write authority
candidate_executions.next_gate: consumer-side local runtime sync remains blocked until a separate approval gate

candidate_executions.rationale: Merge intent-fidelity and launch-evidence checks into existing review and launch Skills instead of creating a duplicate shipping governance Skill.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Added intended-vs-implemented-vs-ready launch evidence, AI-assisted review depth, and release handoff boundaries.
rejected_alternatives: Do not create a standalone ai-shipping-governance Skill.
Do not modify security-ownership-map because it is not approved release inventory.
Do not override repository CI, reviewer, merge, release, or security authority.
boundary_assertions: no hidden CI or release authority
unavailable merge target recorded as deferred
candidate_executions.next_gate: security ownership mapping remains a future candidate only if admitted into approved inventory

candidate_executions.rationale: PRD, story, scenario, issue-readiness, and release-note structure strengthens existing planning, triage, issue slicing, and launch workflows.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Added evidence-state, job/scenario story, acceptance evidence, issue readiness, release-note, and support handoff checks.
rejected_alternatives: Do not create a standalone product execution documents Skill.
Do not fabricate product requirements or release authority.
Do not publish issues or release notes without separate external write authorization.
candidate_executions.next_gate: external issue publication remains consumer-side and separately authorized

candidate_executions.rationale: Discovery planning belongs as evidence/assumption separation in clarification, PRD, and prototype workflows until a dedicated discovery Skill is admitted.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Added target-user/problem/success-signal questions, discovery evidence boundaries, and design-direction assumptions.
rejected_alternatives: Do not create a standalone product discovery Skill in this gate.
Do not merge into grill-me or design-an-interface because they are not approved release inventory.
Do not invent participant data, quotes, analytics, market evidence, or validated research.
candidate_executions.next_gate: future discovery admission may add a dedicated Skill after separate review

candidate_executions.rationale: The approved inventory has no general document or copyediting Skill, so this gate admits only high-boundary documentation-question safeguards.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Added personal, employment-sensitive, legal, privacy, identity, and unsupported-claim boundaries to the document-grounded clarification workflow.
rejected_alternatives: Do not create a standalone personal document Skill in this gate.
Do not merge into doc, edit-article, or writing-shape because they are not approved release inventory.
Do not make legal, employment, compliance, medical, or identity outcome claims.
boundary_assertions: no legal or employment advice authority
candidate_executions.next_gate: general document or copyediting payload needs separate admission before local sync

candidate_executions.rationale: Design quality controls strengthen prototype and review without admitting the Huashu toolchain or a separate design Skill.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Added anti-generic UI prototype expectations, visual assumption recording, and design-quality review axes.
rejected_alternatives: Do not admit Huashu toolchain, browser automation, media export, or generated media behavior.
Do not merge into design-an-interface because it is not approved release inventory.
Do not redistribute upstream source assets.
candidate_executions.next_gate: toolchain or media behavior remains adapter-only pending separate approval

candidate_executions.rationale: Brand asset provenance is safest as a constraint inside visual prototyping and review rather than a standalone asset-acquisition workflow.
candidate_executions.diff_summary: Added official/user-provided/licensed/attributable asset-source requirements and review findings for missing provenance.
rejected_alternatives: Do not create a standalone brand asset Skill.
Do not merge into design-an-interface or doc because they are not approved release inventory.
Do not scrape, download, copy, bundle, or redistribute brand assets.
candidate_executions.next_gate: asset-level provenance review is required before any asset payload or runtime behavior

payload_diff.source_text_boundary: The approved Skill body is a source-text-neutral adaptation and does not copy upstream source text as curated payload.
payload_diff.source_asset_boundary: No upstream assets are vendored, copied, or redistributed.

merge_diff.conflict_policy: Merge text only strengthens boundaries and evidence checks; it does not create duplicate workflow authority or hidden runtime dependencies.

release_manifest_diff: release-manifest.json was rebuilt from skills/ after payload changes and exactly covers approved Skill files.
generated_projection_diff: generated catalog, topology, routing index, lifecycle coverage, routing scenarios, and simulation report were rebuilt from governed registries.
excluded_candidate_boundary: obsidian-cli-runtime-adapter remains adapter-only and absent from skills, routing, manifest, generated projection, publication, live install, and local sync
defuddle-tool-adapter remains adapter-only and absent from skills, routing, manifest, generated projection, publication, live install, and local sync
data-analytics-runtime-equivalence remains reference-only and absent from approved payload
synthetic-data-and-sql-tooling remains adapter-only and absent from approved payload
market-strategy-evidence-boundary remains reference-only and absent from approved payload
legal-privacy-document-boundary remains reference-only and absent from approved payload
html-deck-animation-toolchain-boundary remains adapter-only and absent from approved payload
voiceover-tts-media-pipeline-boundary remains adapter-only and absent from approved payload
bundled-assets-redistribution-boundary remains rejected and absent from approved payload
source_text_boundary: No upstream source text is redistributed as approved curated payload.
source_asset_boundary: No upstream source assets are redistributed.
dependency_credential_and_media_boundary: No dependency is installed, no credential is used, no TTS provider is called, and no external media is generated.
local_runtime_sync_boundary: No files are written to C:\Users\15521\.codex\skills, C:\Users\15521\.agents\skills, or C:\Users\15521\.cc-switch\skills in this stage.
next_gate: After validation passes and GitHub repository state is committed and pushed, request separate approval before any local Codex, agents, or cc-switch runtime sync.
